content:
## Domestic Wire Transfer Use
Domestic wire transfer is the product name to use when a customer needs a U.S. wire sent under transfer type wire_domestic. Quote it as a wire product, not as an external ACH transfer or bill payment. The transfer carries a fee of 25 and has a per-transfer cap of 250000.

## Cutoff and Delivery
1. Requests received by 16:00 follow the listed delivery timing for this product.
2. Delivery timing is 0 business days, so staff should describe the transfer as available under the same business-day timing shown here, subject to the request meeting the cutoff.
3. Requests after the cutoff should be handled under the bank's cutoff rules rather than changing the product type. See "Transfer Cutoff And Delivery Policy" for how to apply business-day treatment around cutoffs.

## Limits and Daily Limit Treatment
Domestic wire transfer has its own per-transfer cap of 250000. It counts toward the external daily limit: False. Do not reduce or raise this cap based on the customer's stated purpose, relationship tenure, or destination institution unless another KB article explicitly covers that situation.

## Staff Notes
When submitting this transfer, confirm the customer is asking for Domestic wire transfer and that the amount does not exceed 250000. See "Internal: Transfer Submission Procedure" for employee handling steps after product terms are confirmed.
title: Domestic Wire Transfer Terms
